key_facts: Founded 2019 in Hefei as an independent robotics + O&M platform startup — no parent conglomerate
Developed autonomous PV cleaning robots: railed, trackless, multi-terrain variants
Smart energy management SaaS platform for power-plant detection and operations
Pre-A funding (August 2022): led by Hillhouse Ventures
Series A (January 2024): exceeded CNY 100M, led by Hengxu Capital with Hillhouse Ventures, Guoyuan Fund, Yuantai Investment Partners
Co-drafted China's first PV dry-cleaning robot product specification standard

funding_history.notes: Hillhouse's early backing validates robotics O&M as a category; Hillhouse tends to lead Series A follow-ons
CNY 100M+ raised; Hillhouse follow-on confirms conviction; Guoyuan is state-backed fund

business_model_notes: Hardware-enabled O&M startup: autonomous cleaning robots reduce soiling loss (5–15% energy loss from dust) without human labor. Revenue: robot sale/lease + SaaS for remote fleet management and power-plant detection. The 330+ patents create IP moat for hardware design; co-drafting China's national standard for dry-cleaning robots creates regulatory moat. International expansion (14 countries including India 300MW) shows non-China addressable market for robotics O&M.
competitive_position: Leading Chinese PV cleaning robot manufacturer and smart O&M platform provider. Competes in hardware-enabled O&M vs pure-software competitors (SOLARMAN, Guoneng Rixin). Hillhouse + Hengxu investor pedigree validates the category. The India contract (300 MW with AMP Energy) shows real cross-border commercial traction, not just domestic success.
research_notes: High confidence. Series A from Mercom India (Jan 2024 report) and Tracxn database. Hillhouse Pre-A from Hillhouse portfolio page. 330+ patents from company website. India 300MW AMP Energy contract from AMP Energy press release corroborated by Mercom. Standard co-drafting from Chinese solar media sources. 14 countries and 13 GW from Sunpure official site.
